message:
fix(quota): rotate all blocked sessions to one account, add cycle --client flag

Quota rotate now assigns all rate-limited sessions to the best available
account (LRU) instead of spreading 1:1. This matches the operational pattern
of draining one account at a time before moving on.

Also adds --client flag to gt cycle next/prev for correct tmux client
targeting when invoked via run-shell.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
